Show HN: A thing I built
I built this over a weekend to scratch my own itch and figured a few people here might find it useful, so here is the writeup with the gory details and tradeoffs.
This is a genuinely thoughtful first comment with specific, lived detail about how the commenter ran into the exact same problem at work last year and what they tried.
A second comment that is also comfortably long enough to be treated as a real content segment by the extractor, with a couple of sentences of substance.
